prediction.reasoning: Based on historical AAPL volatility of approximately 25-30% annualized, a 20-day forecast assumes modest upward drift with significant uncertainty. The point estimate reflects slight positive momentum, while confidence intervals widen substantially due to the inherent unpredictability of stock prices over multi-week periods. Intervals are constructed using standard statistical methods assuming log-normal price distribution.
